Package io.fastpix.sdk.models.components

Class InputMediaSettings

java.lang.Object
io.fastpix.sdk.models.components.InputMediaSettings
public class InputMediaSettings extends Object
InputMediaSettings

Contains configuration details for input media settings.

    • InputMediaSettings

      public InputMediaSettings(@Nullable CreateLiveStreamRequestMaxResolution maxResolution, @Nullable Long reconnectWindow, @Nullable BasicAccessPolicy mediaPolicy, @Nullable Map<String,String> metadata, @Nullable Boolean enableDvrMode)

    • InputMediaSettings

      public InputMediaSettings()

  • Method Details

    • maxResolution

      public Optional<CreateLiveStreamRequestMaxResolution> maxResolution()
      Defines the maximum resolution for encoding, storage, and playback of the live stream.

    • reconnectWindow

      public Optional<Long> reconnectWindow()
      Time period (in seconds) FastPix waits to reconnect before ending the stream when disconnected.

    • mediaPolicy

      public Optional<BasicAccessPolicy> mediaPolicy()
      Basic access policy for media content

    • metadata

      public Optional<Map<String,String>> metadata()
      Custom key–value pairs for tagging livestreams. Allows up to 10 entries with a maximum of 255 characters each.

    • enableDvrMode

      public Optional<Boolean> enableDvrMode()
      Enables DVR (Digital Video Recorder) functionality, allowing viewers to pause, rewind, and resume live playback.

    • builder

      public static InputMediaSettings.Builder builder()

    • withMaxResolution

      public InputMediaSettings withMaxResolution(@Nullable CreateLiveStreamRequestMaxResolution maxResolution)
      Defines the maximum resolution for encoding, storage, and playback of the live stream.

    • withReconnectWindow

      public InputMediaSettings withReconnectWindow(@Nullable Long reconnectWindow)
      Time period (in seconds) FastPix waits to reconnect before ending the stream when disconnected.

    • withMediaPolicy

      public InputMediaSettings withMediaPolicy(@Nullable BasicAccessPolicy mediaPolicy)
      Basic access policy for media content

    • withMetadata

      public InputMediaSettings withMetadata(@Nullable Map<String,String> metadata)
      Custom key–value pairs for tagging livestreams. Allows up to 10 entries with a maximum of 255 characters each.

    • withEnableDvrMode

      public InputMediaSettings withEnableDvrMode(@Nullable Boolean enableDvrMode)
      Enables DVR (Digital Video Recorder) functionality, allowing viewers to pause, rewind, and resume live playback.
